name: on inbound lead -> task (WEBHOOK ingest, GATED)

meta.description: Out-of-band intake: POST /webhook/ingest/lead {source,subject,body} -> creates a task in the intake project via MCP (LOW write). GATED: stays inert unless INGEST_ENABLED=1 — do NOT enable until legal Gate 1 + the day-one technical gate are green (no real personal data before then). Scoped identity wf:inbound-lead-intake -> [tasks.create]. Env: INGEST_ENABLED, INGEST_SECRET, HUB_SERVICE_TOKEN, AGENCY_TENANT_ID, INTAKE_PROJECT_ID.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "tasks.create", arguments: { tenantId: $env.AGENCY_TENANT_ID, projectId: $env.INTAKE_PROJECT_ID, title: $json.title } } }) }}
